descriptions.value: "I'm Yuuka Kazami, you must be here for the CBT sessions."

descriptions.name: Yuuka Kazami
descriptions.type: CBT With Yuuka Kazami Trading Card

descriptions.value: She seems to take quite a liking to you, better not disappoint her!

descriptions.name: Yuuka Kazami Staring At You
descriptions.type: CBT With Yuuka Kazami Trading Card

descriptions.value: It still falls within spell card rules.

descriptions.name: Yuuka's New Spellcard (Trading Card)

descriptions.value:
Patchouli Knowledge lives in the Scarlet Devil Mansion and is in charge of the building's library. She is a long time friend of the owner of the mansion, Remilia Scarlet. 

Some people think Patchouli is rather gloomy, but it's been shown that she can be quite cheerful!

descriptions.name: Patchouli Knowledge
descriptions.type: CBT With Yuuka Kazami Trading Card

descriptions.value:
You've gotten advice from Sakuya, lessons from Yuuka and finally a gift from Patchouli, thank you for playing to the end! 

Always remember the promise you made to these three.

descriptions.name: Sunflower Scarlet Servant Finale
descriptions.type: CBT With Yuuka Kazami Trading Card

descriptions.value: A symbol of success and bravery.
A symbol of strength and confidence.
A symbol of intelligence and responsibility.
A symbol of wisdom and life.
The confident guesser, easily recognising the word behind the drawing before them.
A penguin sitting on a cloud, controlling the pour of water beneath. Obviously.
A cat following its truest call of nature; it is sleepy.
A joyful rabbit, embracing the warm thought of a friend they hold dear.
A hungry frog, ready for its next opulent meal.
The famous cheese caravan, carrying their most noble artisan goods to a country far away.
This snail climbed up on the monkey's head.
This Snail is not afraid of sea monsters!
This friendship is one with a surprise.
This Castle is home to the juiciest snails.

We are waiting for you on the roof! 
Shall we go bird hunting? 
There are 3 birds hiding somewhere.

Someone forgot to feed the cats...
Shall we go bird hunting? 
There are 6 birds hiding somewhere.

Just look at this impudent bird!
Shall we go bird hunting? 
There are 5 birds hiding somewhere.

We dream of fish...
But there are only impudent birds around!
Shall we go bird hunting? 
There are 3 birds hiding somewhere.

The birds are attacking! 
Only the Mustachioed King will save us!
Shall we go bird hunting? 
There are 6 birds hiding somewhere.

descriptions.value:
Like an astronaut! 
This bag is very comfortable.

What are you up to? 
Like a ninja. 
This is your prey.

What a pleasant meeting! 
Are you hungry?

He is not afraid of anything!
He is not afraid of this cat... 
Really?

This cat is too tired.
It's time to rest. 
As long as the bird doesn't get in the way!

Rebecca is an Asian-American Business Lady.
She like to work overtime with a laptop and a glass of wine.

Nicolette is an African-American Milf.
She love to drink champagne and sassy boys.

Candy is a white suburban cheerleader!
She's 18 years old and she's ready for Adventures!

GameStation Girl is a fantasy if your favorite gaming console has become a girl.
She has way to many commercial BS in her pretty head. But she's still incredibly cute!

Killy Whilly is a Vtuber.
She thinks she's a Killer Whale. Love to eat fish and listen to Whale songs at the dawn.
It's a clear morning, the cats are still asleep. And the birds are discussing the bright sun.
The trucks are coming, and the birds are dreaming of doughnuts.

descriptions.name: And then there are the cats
descriptions.market_name: And then there are the cats

descriptions.value: It's a holiday outside. Everyone loves ice cream, even the aliens.
The aliens like candy, too... The birds are worried.
